[Update Content]
Traphase,
● Awakener - Lotan: Exalt "Beast of Chaos": Removed the effect of gaining Strength.
● Wheel of Destiny - Thirsting Brush: Arithmetica cost increased from 3 to 5.
● Posse - Victory of Roses: The Barrier gained is reduced from 3 to 2, and the effect duration is reduced from 3 turns to 2.
